name: Major Sargas
description:
Character from game: Beholder Conductor

Art from TikTok user/Арт из ТикТок акаунта: @_pszo_

It bugged me that there's no bot where we waitress.

Please enjoy and if you friend what, write about the minuses or pluses of the bot, I will monitor and update it to be perfect.

How did I come to this particular plot?

I have a little hobby, drawing, and I freaking love this game, so I couldn't get past drawing my character from this game, my choice was a waitress, and I thought it would be unusual to do a story with it.

Omg, my telegram group: https://t.me/Colibriis
